Enum esriServerMessageCodeEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Codes for server messages generated by System assembly.

[Guid("F0C4087A-2CD3-4EBA-9E8C-CD48B85FA22A")]
public enum esriServerMessageCodeEnum

Fields

esriSystemMessageCode_BinaryRequestReceived = 100003

100003: Binary Request received.

esriSystemMessageCode_BinaryResponseSent = 100004

100004: Binary Response sent.

esriSystemMessageCode_Debug = 100000

100000: Debug information

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorImportFromMem = 100010

100010: Loading binary request from memory failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorLoadBinaryStream = 100011

100011: Loading binary request into a memory stream failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorLoadFromString = 100006

100006: Loading SOAP request from string failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorReadXml = 100007

100007: Reading XML of a SOAP request failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorSaveToString = 100009

100009: Saving SOAP response to a string failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorWriteBinaryResponse = 100013

100013: Writing binary response failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_ErrorWriteXml = 100008

100008: Writing XML of a SOAP response failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_RequestFailed = 100005

100005: Request processing failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_SetResponseStreamVersion = 100012

100012: Setting stream version of a binary response failed.

esriSystemMessageCode_StringRequestReceived = 100001

100001: String Request received.

esriSystemMessageCode_StringResponseSent = 100002

100002: String Response sent.
